titles.title: Safe Access to Cash Act of 2026
Safe Access to Cash Act of 2026
Safe Access to Cash Act of 2026

A bill to amend title 18, United States Code, to establish criminal offenses with respect to violations involving ATMs, regardless of whether the ATM is located on the physical premises of a financial institution, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on the Judiciary.
Committee on the Judiciary. Ordered to be reported with an amendment in the nature of a substitute favorably.
Committee on the Judiciary. Reported by Senator Grassley with an amendment in the nature of a substitute. Without written report.

calendar.text: Placed on Senate Legislative Calendar under General Orders. Calendar No. 350.

committee.name: Senate Judiciary
committee.activity: Reported By, Markup By, Referred To
